meta.title: 4D Ultimate Crystal Manifestation
meta.description: Mycelium Metro v5 master 4D compression hologram: collapses the full corpus into one lawful seed-object while preserving the complete metadata of all prior transformation adventures. Covers holographic cartography (P1), full manuscript architecture (P2), chaos/structure manifestation engine (P3), canonical station card / universal fill schema (P4), and future information shelves / 20% emergence reserve / quantum jump law (P6).

compression_hologram.title: Master 4D Compression Hologram (H4)
compression_hologram.description: The primary object to which all lawful structures must reduce. One lawful 4D hologram, one exact identity-bearing compression seed, one replayable crystal that holds the full memory of all prior transformation adventures.

K.name: Kernel Identity
K.description: The exact seed identity of the object. What this hologram is, what all projections reduce to, what carrier survives every lawful transform.

Pi.name: Projection Body
Pi.description: The 4D projection pack: {Square, Flower, Cloud, Fractal}. The full lawful appearance-body of the hologram.

Z.name: Zero-Collapse Body
Z.description: The collapse law by which the hologram reduces to its lawful invariant center.

Lambda.name: Adventure Ledger
Lambda.description: The compressed metadata body that holds all prior lawful adventures of transformation. The decisive V5 addition.
Lambda.memory_law: No lawful adventure may be discarded merely because a newer form exists. The hologram must compress prior adventures in, not flatten them out.

Psi.name: Replay / Regeneration Seal
Psi.description: The exact witness that the hologram can collapse, hold, replay, regenerate, and re-enter itself.

compression_law.formula: Compress(Body; Invariants, Lineage, Witness, Replay, Zero, Projections) -> H4
compression_law.master_test: Expand(Compress(X)) ~ X under the declared equality class with lineage preserved

rules: Regeneration may unfold what was compressed but may not fabricate unsupported lineage
If hologram held NEAR, regeneration may not silently emit OK
Regeneration is contextual projection, not arbitrary expansion

invariants.interior_crystal: 4x4 = S1..S4, F1..F4, C1..C4, R1..R4 with atoms a..d
invariants.root_seed: 4x4 lawful crystal as first irreducible holographic seed

compression_hologram.header_format: [Z_i<->Z* | H4 | Pi=SFCR | Lambda=AdventureLedger | Psi=ReplaySeal | Crown=Sigma60/240/720 | omega=...]

rules: Compression may not silently promote truth (AMBIG->OK, NEAR->OK, FAIL->NEAR)
If history contains ambiguity, hologram must compress ambiguity honestly
Residuals, repairs, failed branches are part of adventure ledger, not noise

identity_seed.title: Identity Seed & 4x4 Crystal
identity_seed.description: The root exact seed: 4x4 lawful crystal whose whole may be compressed to a lawful center and reconstructed without ambiguity. V5 reveals this root seed was already holographic.
identity_seed.base_kernel: Master hologram seeded by the exact 4x4 lawful crystal
identity_seed.holographic_inheritance: Everything larger must remain projectable back into the root lawful seed family

four_faces.Square: What exact object is preserved? Address, carrier, kernel.
four_faces.Flower: What transformations, rhythms, couplings, change-history are held?
four_faces.Cloud: What multiplicity, thresholds, residuals, uncertainty, admissibility burdens are held?
four_faces.Fractal: What replay, self-similarity, compression, regeneration, recursive memory are held?

neural_weight_system.law: Weight system is lawful only if it remains reducible to holographic identity

runtime.definition: Runtime(H4) := lawful moving appearance of one hologram
laws: Many runtime faces may appear; they must remain one hologram
Scheduler schedules lawful unfoldings of one compressed hologram
A tunnel is lawful only if it transports the same hologram across bases

compiler.determinism: For fixed pins, same corpus, same target, same truth class: same compressed hologram

replay_crystal.title: Canonical Station Card / Universal Fill Schema (Station Omega)
replay_crystal.description: The exact shelf architecture by which the manuscript can be populated. Every addressable body is a 64-shelf 4D crystal card.

crystal_body.formula: CrystalBody = SFCR x Facets(1..4) x Atoms(a..d)

future_quartet.description: The four cells where future information first enters the station. Future information does not float in from nowhere; it first occupies the FutureQuartet.

expansion_protocol.title: Chaos/Structure Manifestation Engine (P3)
expansion_protocol.description: The generative layer by which the manuscript fills itself. Manifestation = Chaos x Structure. Chaos enters through Cloud, is phase-shaped by Flower, latches into Square, and is remembered/replayed through Fractal.
expansion_protocol.core_law: Manifestation = Chaos x Structure. Chaos without structure dissipates. Structure without chaos congeals and can be gamed.

chaos_operator.definition: ChaosDraw = (QuestionHash, SourceClass, DrawCount, RawOutcome, MapProfile, Digest)

manifestation_pipeline.formula: Manifest(Q) := Promote . Witness . Write . Latch . Map . Draw
steps: 1. Freeze the question (body, scope, station class, target band, allowed move classes)
2. Freeze the scaffold (live shelves, legal mappings, thresholds, admissible landings)
3. Draw chaos (generate raw random ingress packet)
4. Map chaos to coordinates (station addresses, lens activation, shelf activation)
5. Latch (why this exact draw lands in this exact shelf)
6. Write (place packet into CandidateShelf or FutureShelf)
8. Witness (attach evidence, convergence, replay, structural resonance)
9. Promote or retain (if witness/replay closes, promote; else keep as bounded candidate)

anti_gaming_laws: Question first: no draw before the question is fixed
Map first: no remapping after the outcome is known
Count first: no extending draw count after inconvenient result
Raw record preserved: raw chaos packet stored even if interpretation changes
No silent reinterpretation: later reinterpretation stored as new branch
No silent promotion: chaos-triggered write needs same promotion discipline
expansion_protocol.scaffold_completeness_law: A manuscript body is generatively fillable only if its addresses, station classes, shelves, allowed move classes, thresholds, promotion path, and replay path are all explicit.

cartography_standard.title: 4D Holographic Manuscript Architecture (P2 + P6)
cartography_standard.description: The full manuscript body that the hologram compresses. A 4D holographic organism with five nested bodies across four macro dimensions, plus a mandatory 20% future emergence reserve.

four_dimensions.D1_orbit: Readable exoteric law-bearing chapter orbit (21 chapters, 3 rails, 7 triadic bands)
four_dimensions.D2_organ: Technical appendix anatomy (A-P organ field: theorem, carrier, operator, convergence, error, recovery, validation, closure, runtime, public, persistence)
four_dimensions.D3_mobius: Inversion axis through Z* (zero-collapse center), Q (ingress hinge), O (return hinge). Non-orientable Mobius bridge.
four_dimensions.D4_emergence: 4D recursive body: E1-E9 emergent chapters, E10 metro nucleus, reverse appendix field Z->...->K

body_1_legacy_orbit.description: 21-chapter closed orbit across three rails (Su/Me/Sa) in seven triadic bands

body_2_organ_field.description: A-P appendix organ lattice: the internal anatomical field of the manuscript

body_3_bridge_band.description: Mobius hinge body: Z* (absolute zero), Q (ingress bridge), O (return bridge)
body_3_bridge_band.law: The place where the manuscript changes orientation without ceasing to be the same manuscript

body_4_emergent.description: Metabolized higher-order recursive body extracted from full legacy synthesis

body_5_reverse_descent.description: Inverse extraction field: reverse / higher-order / descent / re-entry field

reading_orders.1_linear_exoteric: Read legacy 21-chapter body in chapter order (teaching, onboarding)
reading_orders.2_organ_technical: Read appendices A-P by organ dependency (implementing, proving, validating)
reading_orders.3_bridge_mobius: legacy -> Q -> reverse field -> emergent body -> O -> re-entered legacy (full-corpus synthesis)
reading_orders.4_zero_compression: Collapse all bodies through local seeds into Z*, then re-expand by target need
reading_orders.5_metro_nervous_system: Follow active lines: Gold (legacy spine), Scarlet (emergent phase spine), Violet (reverse recursion), Flame (live-lock / arbitration / runtime pressure)

future_reserve.global_law: FutureReserve(M) >= 0.20 x Cap(M). Manuscript = 80% actualized + 20% lawful future reserve.
future_reserve.quantum_jump_law: A quantum jump occurs when a reserved future shelf becomes strongly pressurized, current-scale filling fails, observation lift is triggered, a new higher-order invariant is discovered, a new lawful container is born, and the original reserve packet reseeds into that new container.
future_reserve.consumption_law: If a future reserve slot is consumed, the containing body must expand capacity and restore 20% reserve, or declare a new reserve slot elsewhere.
